Spiroc Wingblade  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Serpent Sight (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Spiroc Wingblade
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Serpent Sight (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 10.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Frakis Twofist
Lucy Entry By:VaderFLAG
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 20:33:00
Page Updated:Sun Jul 26th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Sky
NPC Name
The Spiroc Lord

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

East Freeport
Quest Name
Warrior Epic: Jagged Blade of War

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Sky


Uploaded November 26th, 2019 by iventheassassin

fairly easy
QuoteReply
# May 07 2012 at 12:59 AM Rating: Decent
Keraz
54 posts
Was pretty easy, Lord spawns one after another and many blades dropped, he don't DT much at all and i would say is soloable and not a hard kill

Nindail

# Dec 28 2007 at 10:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594571671911
Scholar
35 posts
Hello,

My name is Jugga 55war and Nindail 78cleric both on Luclin server, I am looking to buy this MQ, I only have 20k though, I am really hoping to get this and to kill Queen Chardok, it is all I need to complete Jugga's epic. I've played Nindail forever, never playing or leveling up any other toons so i feel satisfaction out of compeleting Jugga's epic even though there may be other weapons out there. Any help would be greatly appreciated, Please send tell or in game email to Jugga or Nindail if you have a Spiroc Wingblade or are willing to help kill the Queen. Thank you very much

Nindail

Wingblade
QuoteReply
# Jan 02 2006 at 10:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592767473928
6 posts
Don't feel bad, last time we were in posky we had 5 peeps in need of the wingblade. I was 4th on the list. The blade dropped for the first 3 right off the bat, when my turn came I sacraficed myself to the lord 5 times and no drop. The sixth time I fell off the edge and every time they rezzed me I would be falling back to freeport. Wouldn't ya know it, that time he had the blade and since I couldn't get to it I gave it up to the next guy in line. *pout*

Edited, Mon Jan 2 09:13:55 2006
▲ Page top
